mapper.sql: id, device_code, software_pn, software_build_ver, software_report, software_desc, software_source, adaptive_assembly_pn, adaptive_software_pn, release_date, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_software_build_version ( id, device_code, software_pn, software_build_ver, software_report, software_desc, software_source, adaptive_assembly_pn, adaptive_software_pn, release_date, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{deviceCode}, #{softwarePn}, #{softwareBuildVer}, #{softwareReport}, #{softwareDesc}, #{softwareSource}, #{adaptiveAssemblyPn}, #{adaptiveSoftwarePn}, #{releaseDate}, #{description}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO tb_software_build_version ( id, device_code, software_pn, software_build_ver, software_report, software_desc, software_source, adaptive_assembly_pn, adaptive_software_pn, release_date, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.deviceCode}, #{item.softwarePn}, #{item.softwareBuildVer}, #{item.softwareReport}, #{item.softwareDesc}, #{item.softwareSource}, #{item.adaptiveAssemblyPn}, #{item.adaptiveSoftwarePn}, #{item.releaseDate}, #{item.description}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_software_build_version t SET
t.device_code = #{deviceCode},
t.software_pn = #{softwarePn},
t.software_build_ver = #{softwareBuildVer},
t.software_report = #{softwareReport},
t.software_desc = #{softwareDesc},
t.software_source = #{softwareSource},
t.adaptive_assembly_pn = #{adaptiveAssemblyPn},
t.adaptive_software_pn = #{adaptiveSoftwarePn},
t.release_date = #{releaseDate},
t.description = #{description},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_software_build_version t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_software_build_version t WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_software_build_version t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT FROM tb_software_build_version t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
ORDER BY t.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_software_build_version t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
